videos.headline: Kanye Udoh rushes for 12-yard Army TD
videos.description: Kanye Udoh charges straight up the middle for a 12-yard touchdown, extending Army's lead over Air Force.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kanye Udoh rushes for 12-yard Army TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Air Force QB Josh Johnson is picked by Max DiDomenico
videos.description: Air Force QB Josh Johnson throws a costly intercepted pass to Army's Max DiDomenico late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Air Force QB Josh Johnson is picked by Max DiDomenico) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Casey Larkin secures pick for Army
videos.description: Army's defense shows a blitz, and Casey Larkin gets the pick early in the fourth quarter for Army.
